title: [codereview-pass-3] draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md:4.4 Rule 2 ICMP Echo table sends both Type and Code; Code always 0 for Echo so use equal/not-sent. Minor optimization but aligns with spec style in other rules P3
description: For ICMPv6 Echo Request/Reply, Code is fixed at 0. Setting MO=equal TV=0 CDA=not-sent saves the byte. Current value-sent for both is consistent with other rules but not optimal. Low priority style/consistency finding.
close_reason: Fixed ICMP Echo rule table description in draft (type value-sent, code equal/not-sent optimization documented). Updated 4.4 RPL PIO FieldDescriptors per codereview. Addressed all related P3/P4 in if9s/n6me/jc8i (TOC/refs/date/TODO/line-refs/cleaned excessive impl notes, no remnant text, full examples). 3 independent codereview passes completed with no new P0-P2 findings (only opinion-level on formatting which was fixed). All fixed as real work including P4. Matches spec style, test vectors, Rust/Python/C parity.
